title: acilepis fysonii
intro: Acilepis fysonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Indian firweed. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Acilepis fysonii include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and pain in the body. Acilepis fysonii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Indian medicine to promote overall well-being.
